title: Confluence 3.0
subtitle: An annual technical event that enhances ECE students skills through innovation, collaboration, and real-world problem-solving.
description:
Title of the event: Confluence 3.0 - Spectrum Slam 
 Objective of the event: Annual competition held to give adequate exposure to ECE Dept. students of the industry. 
 Benefits in terms of learning/skill/knowledge obtained: For second-year ECE students, participating in CONFLUENCE 3.0: Spectrum Slam offered valuable learning oppurtunities. The event, themed "Collaborative Solutions for a Sustainable Future" fostered creativity through contests like the Ideathon, Hackathon, and Project Showcase. In addition, participants enhanced their technical knowledge, teamwork, and problem-solving abilities while gaining practical experience and confidence in applying concepts to real-world challenges.
location: Bharati Vidyapeeth's College of Engineering, New Delhi
highlights: Annual competition held to give adequate exposure to ECE Dept. students of the industry.
